item.title: Space Invaders
item.hint: 줄지어 내려오는 외계 침략자를 막는 상징적 슈팅
item.description: Rows of descending alien invaders move in unison toward defensive bunkers while a lone cannon at the bottom fires upward across a stark black sky.
